content.en:
"The injury is slightly stabilized!"

Shadowstone Pathway.

It will take a long time to recover from the injury, but at least the injury will not get worse.

Moreover, the place he was looking for was relatively hidden, and coupled with his concealment ability, it would take a long time for the Soul Splitting Red Beast here to find him.

When that happens, he can leave at any time.

"Heal here first, and when the healing is almost done, just leave!"

Shadowstone planned.

However, he suddenly sensed that there were quite a few Transformation-level Soul Splitting Red Beasts around him.

"Exposed!"

He thought of it for the first time.

But the Soul Splitting Red Beast shouldn't be good at tracking, when he fled into the Soul Splitting Red Light area before, although he attracted the attention of those Soul Splitting Red Beasts, he fled too fast, and when those Soul Splitting Red Beasts arrived, he had already run away without a shadow.

It stands to reason that even if these Soul Splitting Red Beasts cast a net to find him, they would not be able to lock his location so quickly!

"Run!"

Shadowstone immediately fled.

However, he underestimated the number of Soul Breaker Red Beasts that had arrived this time.

Rumble!!!!

A Soul Splitting Red Beast that respected the transformation level made a move, and there was no lack of existence at the peak of the transformation level.

The strength of these incarnate-level peak existences in the Soul Splitting Red Light Region is a little stronger than his!

What's more, he is still in a state of heavy damage, and he can't exert one-tenth of his combat power.

Under the siege of these Transformation-level Soul Breaker Red Beasts, Shadowstone was soon on the verge of death.

"Damn, let's all die together!"

Shadowstone blew itself up.

The terrifying annihilation power shattered the surrounding space-time, and several Transformation-level Soul Splitting Red Beasts were directly hit hard, and several other Transformation-level Red Beasts were slightly injured.

Due to the chaos of time and space at the moment when the Shadow Stone exploded, these Soul Splitting Red Beasts only thought that the Shadow Stone was dead, so they left one by one without looking closely.

In fact, Shadowstone is completely dead, and he only blew himself up in his shell.

As a primordial antiquity, as long as a trace of origin is hidden, it is not a fall.

And he fused a trace of his origin into the Eternal Flint, and then used the self-explosion to send the Eternal Flint away, hiding from this group of Transformation-level Soul Splitting Red Beasts.

If it were another metamorphosis level or cultivator, it would definitely not be able to do so.

But his body is a primordial antiquity monolith, and the eternal flint is also a type of stone, so it belongs to the same root and the same origin, and this time it can contain a trace of his origin.

......

Somewhere in the red light of Soul Breaker, a fiery red stone emerged.

At this time.

A phantasm appeared above the stone.

And this stone is the eternal flint, and the phantom is the manifestation of the origin of the shadow stone.

"It's really dangerous to cut off the forbidden area, you shouldn't have come in the first place!"

Shadowstone smiled bitterly.

Now, he has come to this end, although he has not completely fallen yet, but in fact it is equivalent to falling, and at present, he is only relying on the eternal flint to forcibly keep the last trace of the source.

But this state could not be sustained, and when the Eternal Flint could not keep a trace of his origin, he would fall completely.

"I have to find a way to return to the Boulder Tribe, it doesn't matter if I die, but this Eternal Flint is the hope of the Boulder Tribe, and it can't be lost here!" Shadowstone said darkly.

Even if he finds the weak point of the space-time barrier now, he can't break the barrier and return to the outside world, and he must find a passage to connect to the outside world so that he can get out.

He can then notify the Transformation Tier of the Boulder Tribe to pick it up and bring the Eternal Fire Stone back.

"Let's condense an eightfold ancestor body first, it's too inconvenient to have a body, and I can't bear the slightest danger if I encounter a little danger!"

Immediately, the Shadow Stone began to condense its body.

After a while, a simple eightfold original ancestor body was condensed, but such a body couldn't help the consumption of the battle, after all, he only had a trace of origin left, and once he fought, the origin would be exhausted in a while.

"Next, you have to be careful, you must not encounter the Soul Splitting Red Beast again!"

Shadowstone muttered.

......

"That primordial artifact was killed?"

Ye Tian learned the news from the mouths of other Soul Splitting Red Beasts, so at present, the upper echelons of the Soul Splitting Red Beasts no longer asked to find outsiders.

And yet this day.

Ye Tian occasionally got a piece of news from the Nine-Fold Building, which was originally known to the Nine-Fold Origin Ancestor, but then it spread, so even the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor knew about it, and he naturally knew it.

"Monolithic Tribe, Shadow Stone, Eternal Flint!"

Although Ye Tian didn't know much information, just knowing some of it was extremely amazing.

"The Shadow Stone of the Boulder Tribe took the Eternal Flint Stone to the flame area of the forbidden area?The flame area is the flame area outside the Soul Splitting Red Light Area, I have been there before, but the body of the Soul Splitting Red Beast can't bear it at all, and it instantly turns into ashes!"

Ye Tian now roughly knew who the primordial artifact that had broken into the Soul Splitting Red Light Region was, and it was clearly the shadow stone of the Boulder Tribe.

"So, Shadow Stone should have encountered danger in the Flame Zone, so it had to flee into the Soul Breaker Red Light Region, but was pitted by me, and then besieged and killed by the Soul Breaker Red Beast?"

"No, there were a lot of Soul Splitting Red Beasts that went to encircle and suppress the Shadow Stone at that time, and those weaker Soul Splitting Red Beasts hid around and didn't make a move, but they could also see clearly that the Shadow Stone exploded by itself, but there was no Eternal Flint Stone!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The aura of the Eternal Flint is difficult to hide, even if the Soul Splitting Red Beast has never seen the Eternal Flint and does not know the use of the Eternal Flint Stone, if such treasures are still there, those Soul Splitting Red Beasts will not be unable to find it.

Then there is a possibility that Shadowstone is not completely dead.

"Even if the Shadow Stone is not dead, it must be useless, he should still be in the Soul Splitting Red Beast area, if I find him, wouldn't I be able to kill him and seize the Eternal Flint Stone?"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

That's the Eternal Flint Stone, and there's hope for creating a Ninefold Ancestor!

Even the Nine-Fold Building only has nine Ninefold Ancestors, such as the Stone Chaos Dao Ancestor, who has broken the 100-level boundary of the life level, far beyond the ordinary Ninefold Ancestor peak powerhouse, but so far he has not achieved the Strongest Ninefold Ancestor.

This shows how difficult it is to become the Xeon Ninefold Ancestor.

Although he didn't know how to become the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor, and whether he would also fall into this bottleneck in the future, if he obtained the Eternal Flint Stone, he would not have this worry in the future.

"Find the Shadow Stone!"

Ye Tian decided.

As a result, he began to constantly search for the existence of the Shadow Stone in the Soul Splitting Red Beast area, and the copying talent was always on.

Time passed slowly, and finally on this day, Ye Tian discovered the traces of the Shadow Stone!
